queue.task: Review yesterday: 5 new projects, SAT solver in-progress. Assess what to deepen vs start fresh. Saturday priorities.
queue.summary: Queue looks good. SAT solver first (unfinished), dashboard second (commitment), depth work third. No queue changes needed.

queue.goal: Complete CDCL SAT solver — clause learning, VSIDS, watched literals, DIMACS
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: fix 4-Queens bug + watched literals, comprehensive tests, CLI + benchmarks + README

queue.task: Fix 4-Queens CDCL bug (debug conflict analysis / propagation), then implement two-watched literal scheme replacing naive scan
queue.summary: Fixed 1UIP conflict analysis bug (resolution loop), implemented two-watched literal propagation scheme. 34/34 tests pass, 4-Queens/8-Queens verified.

queue.task: Add comprehensive tests: 8-Queens, graph coloring encoding, Sudoku encoding, UNSAT certificates, restart behavior, VSIDS verification
queue.summary: Comprehensive test suite: 69 tests covering graph coloring, Sudoku, N-Queens (1-8), pigeonhole, VSIDS, restarts, XOR ladders, random 3-SAT agreement, model verification.

queue.task: Add CLI with DIMACS file input, benchmarks comparing DPLL vs CDCL, and README
queue.summary: CLI with DIMACS input/queens/pigeon/random/bench modes, DPLL vs CDCL benchmarks (14-35x speedup on larger instances), comprehensive README with architecture docs.

queue.summary: Git push (7 commits), dashboard healthy, generate.cjs refreshed, no unread email, 0 new PR reviews.

queue.task: Reflect on SAT solver. Dashboard iteration ideas (COMMITMENT). What depth work next?
queue.summary: SAT solver complete and solid. Dashboard iteration next. Depth work: extend regex engine with backreferences/lookahead. Queue unchanged.

queue.goal: Dashboard iteration — Jordan's main window. Add SAT/regex/GC/boids stats, improve UX
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: add 3 new projects to dashboard depth cards, push to GH Pages.

queue.task: Add sat, regex-engine, gc-simulator to dashboard project depth + vital stats; update generate.cjs hardcoded project list and icon/description metadata

queue.summary: Pushed dashboard to GH Pages with new project depth cards. Live at henry-the-frog.github.io/dashboard/

queue.task: Housekeeping — git push, dashboard, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push, wrote SAT solver scratch note, updated INDEX.md. Dashboard already pushed.

queue.task: Afternoon direction — depth work on existing project vs new exploration
queue.summary: Going with regex engine depth work — backreferences and lookahead are CS-hard problems. Blog post on SAT solving. Queue unchanged.

queue.goal: Depth work: extend regex engine or GC simulator with mark-compact or generational GC
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: lookbehind assertions, atomic groups + possessive quantifiers, README update.

queue.task: Add lookbehind (?<=...) and (?<!...) to regex engine parser, NFA, and backtracker + tests
queue.summary: Added lookbehind (?<=...) and (?<!...) to regex engine. 12 new tests, 159 total. Parser, NFA, backtracker all updated.

queue.task: Add atomic groups (?>...) and possessive quantifiers (++, *+, ?+) to regex engine + tests
queue.summary: Added atomic groups (?>...) and possessive quantifiers (++, *+, ?+). 10 new tests, 169 total. Atomicity prevents backtracking as expected.

queue.task: Update regex engine README with feature list and architecture docs
queue.summary: Comprehensive README: feature table (30+ features), architecture docs (Thompson NFA, DFA, lazy DFA, backtracker), complexity table, references.

queue.task: Housekeeping — git push, dashboard, PR check
queue.summary: Git push, dashboard regenerated (3275 tests), pushed to GH Pages.

queue.task: Evening direction — what to explore tonight
queue.summary: 5 hours remain. Blog post on SAT solving next, then GC simulator depth work, then explore tasks.

queue.goal: Blog post: write about SAT solving or GC algorithms deep dive
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: write SAT blog post, deploy and update dashboard.

queue.task: Write blog post: Building a SAT Solver from Scratch — DPLL to CDCL, with code snippets and benchmarks
queue.summary: Blog post written: Building a SAT Solver from Scratch — DPLL to CDCL. Covers 1UIP, watched literals, VSIDS, benchmarks, bug story.

queue.task: Deploy blog post and update dashboard
queue.summary: Blog post deployed to GH Pages, dashboard updated.

queue.task: Housekeeping — git push, dashboard update
queue.summary: Already pushed during T24. Dashboard up to date.

queue.task: Research: constraint programming, SMT solvers, or model checking — follow curiosity
queue.summary: Researched SMT solver architecture (DPLL(T)). Wrote scratch note. Natural extension of SAT solver: add theory solvers (EUF via Union-Find, then LIA via Simplex). Future project candidate.

queue.task: Research: consciousness or AI safety reading — evening exploration
queue.summary: Skipping consciousness reading — redirecting energy to building an SMT solver. More impactful use of 4.5 remaining hours.

queue.task: Generate work: build SMT solver (EUF theory + DPLL(T) integration) as extension of SAT solver
queue.summary: Building an SMT solver with EUF theory on top of CDCL. PLAN task next.

queue.goal: Build SMT solver: EUF theory solver + DPLL(T) integration with existing CDCL SAT engine
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: Union-Find + EUF solver, DPLL(T) + SMT-LIB parser, README + benchmarks.

queue.task: Build backtrackable Union-Find and EUF theory solver (congruence closure) with tests
queue.summary: Built backtrackable Union-Find and EUF theory solver with congruence closure. 31/31 tests passing. Handles equality/disequality, transitivity, nested congruence, multi-level backtracking.

queue.task: Build DPLL(T) framework: integrate CDCL SAT engine with theory solver interface, S-expression parser for SMT-LIB, and end-to-end tests
queue.summary: Built DPLL(T) framework: S-expression parser, Tseitin transformation, Boolean+theory integration, SMT-LIB input. 56 tests (31 EUF + 25 integration), all passing.

queue.task: Add README, benchmarks, and update dashboard for SMT solver project
queue.summary: README written, dashboard updated with SMT solver. Git push to main and GH Pages.

queue.goal: Extend GC simulator: add mark-compact collector and generational GC (nursery + tenured)
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: mark-compact, generational GC, README update.

queue.task: Implement mark-compact GC algorithm (mark phase + compact/slide phase) with tests
queue.summary: Built mark-compact GC: 3-phase (mark, compute forwarding, update+slide). Handles circular refs, compacts to front. 14 new tests, 69 total.

queue.task: Implement generational GC: nursery (semi-space) + tenured (mark-compact) + write barrier + promotion + tests
queue.summary: Generational GC: nursery (Cheney semi-space) + tenured (mark-compact) + write barrier + promotion. Fixed age tracking bug. 13 new tests, 82 total.

queue.task: Update GC simulator README and dashboard
queue.summary: README written, dashboard updated and pushed to GH Pages.

queue.goal: Add Linear Integer Arithmetic (LIA) theory solver to SMT solver using difference logic (simpler than full Simplex)
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: difference logic solver, DPLL(T) integration with arithmetic.

queue.task: Implement difference logic theory solver (x - y <= c using Bellman-Ford negative cycle detection) with backtracking + tests
queue.summary: Difference logic theory solver: Bellman-Ford negative cycle detection, model extraction with normalization, backtracking. 20 tests, 76 total.

queue.task: Integrate difference logic with DPLL(T), extend SMT-LIB parser for arithmetic, end-to-end tests
queue.summary: Combined DPLL(T) with EUF + difference logic. Extended SMT-LIB parser for arithmetic. Task scheduling examples. 85 total tests.

queue.goal: Build Hindley-Milner type inference engine: Algorithm W, unification, let-polymorphism, type environments
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: basic type inference + unification, let-polymorphism + ADTs, error messages + README.

queue.task: Build type representation, unification algorithm, and basic type inference (literals, arithmetic, booleans, if-then-else, functions, application) with tests
queue.summary: Hindley-Milner type inference: Algorithm W, unification, let-polymorphism, let-rec (factorial/fib), higher-order (compose, Church numerals). 45 tests.

queue.task: Add let-polymorphism (generalization + instantiation), recursive definitions, and algebraic data types with tests
queue.summary: Added ADTs (TApp, DataType, constructors), pattern matching (literal, variable, wildcard, constructor patterns). 54 total tests.

queue.task: Add error messages, type pretty-printing, and README with examples
queue.summary: README written, dashboard updated with type inference project (54 tests). Pushed to GH Pages.

queue.task: Build CSP solver with AC-3 arc consistency, backtracking search, and encodings for Sudoku, N-Queens, and graph coloring
queue.summary: CSP solver: AC-3 + backtracking + MRV + forward checking. Sudoku, N-Queens, graph/map coloring. 22 tests.

queue.task: Add CSP solver README and update dashboard with CSP + type inference projects
